{% extends "base.html" %} {% load i18n %} {% block title %}{% translate "Deployment" %}{% endblock %} {% block breadcrumb %}
  • {% translate "Documentation" %}
  • {% translate "Deployment" %}
    • {% endblock %} {% block content %}
    {% translate "On This Page" %}
    • {% translate "Prerequisites" %}
    • {% translate "Setup and Deploy" %}
    • {% translate "Automatic Deployment" %}
    • {% translate "Troubleshooting" %}
    • {% translate "Requirements Files" %}
    • {% translate "Deployment Scripts" %}

    {% translate "Deployment" %}

    {% translate "This template is optimized for PythonAnywhere deployment." %}

    {% translate "Prerequisites" %}

    • {% translate "PythonAnywhere account" %}
    • {% translate "Git repository hosting your project (GitHub, GitLab, etc.)" %}
    • {% translate "API token from PythonAnywhere account" %}

    {% translate "Getting Your API Token" %}

    1. {% translate "Log in to PythonAnywhere" %}
    2. {% translate "Go to" %} Account {% translate "→" %} API token
    3. {% translate "Click" %} Create a new API token
    4. {% translate "The token will be automatically available in your bash console as" %} API_TOKEN

    {% translate "Setup and Deploy" %}

    {% translate "Run these commands in a new Bash console:" %}

    1. {% translate "Clone Your Repository" %}

    git clone <URL> $USER.pythonanywhere.com

    2. {% translate "Navigate to Project" %}

    cd $USER.pythonanywhere.com

    3. {% translate "Create Virtual Environment" %}

    mkvirtualenv $USER --python=/usr/bin/python3.13

    4. {% translate "Upgrade pip" %}

    pip install --upgrade pip

    5. {% translate "Install Dependencies" %}

    pip install -r requirements/production.txt

    6. {% translate "Run Setup Script" %}

    python scripts/setup_pythonanywhere.py

    {% translate "This script will:" %}

    • {% translate "Create the web app on PythonAnywhere" %}
    • {% translate "Configure static file mappings" %}
    • {% translate "Set up environment variables" %}
    • {% translate "Run database migrations" %}
    • {% translate "Collect static files" %}
    • {% translate "Create a superuser" %}
    • {% translate "Generate and configure WSGI file" %}
    {% translate "Note:" %} {% translate "The setup script uses the" %} $USER.pythonanywhere.com {% translate "format for your project folder and webapp." %}

    {% translate "Automatic Deployment" %}

    {% translate "For future updates, run the update script:" %}

    ./scripts/update.sh

    {% translate "This script will:" %}

    • {% translate "Backup the database" %}
    • {% translate "Pull latest changes from git" %}
    • {% translate "Install/upgrade dependencies" %}
    • {% translate "Run database migrations" %}
    • {% translate "Collect static files" %}
    • {% translate "Reload the web app" %}

    {% translate "Backup Database Only" %}

    ./scripts/backupdb.sh

    {% translate "Troubleshooting" %}

    {% translate "Make sure your API token is set. Run:" %}

    echo $API_TOKEN

    {% translate "If empty, regenerate your token in Account → API token" %}

    {% translate "Make sure your virtualenv is activated:" %}

    workon $USER

    {% translate "Or manually:" %}

    source ~/.virtualenvs/$USER/bin/activate

    • {% translate "Check error log in Web tab" %}
    • {% translate "Verify .env file exists and has correct values" %}
    • {% translate "Check that virtualenv path is correct" %}

    {% translate "Requirements Files" %}

    {% translate "File" %} {% translate "Use Case" %}
    requirements/base.txt {% translate "All environments (Django, allauth, PWA, etc.)" %}
    requirements/development.txt {% translate "Local development (+ debug toolbar)" %}
    requirements/production.txt {% translate "Production server (base.txt + pythonanywhere-core)" %}

    {% translate "Deployment Scripts" %}

    {% translate "Located in" %} scripts/:

    {% translate "Script" %} {% translate "Purpose" %}
    setup_pythonanywhere.py {% translate "Initial PythonAnywhere setup (webapp, migrations, superuser)" %}
    update.sh {% translate "Full deployment update (backup, pull, install, migrate, collectstatic, reload)" %}
    reload.sh {% translate "Touch WSGI file to reload server" %}
    backupdb.sh {% translate "Database backup" %}
    create_wsgi.sh {% translate "Generate PythonAnywhere WSGI file" %}
    test {% translate "Run tests with test settings" %}
    push {% translate "Push to remote with submodule updates" %}
    {% endblock %}
